From the highlands of Đắk Lắk to your cup experience the full spectrum of Vietnamese coffee. ❄️ True Brewed Flavor, Instantly This isn’t ordinary instant. Our advanced freeze-drying captures the full aroma and rich taste of freshly brewed Vietnamese coffee. ⚡ Your Cafe, Anywhere Enjoy a perfectly balanced cup—hot or iced—in moments. From your desk to the great outdoors, premium coffee is always within reach. ☕ Authentic Vietnamese Excellence Savor the legendary depth and robust character of 100% Robusta beans, ethically sourced from Vietnam’s Central Highlands. 🌱 Uncompromised Quality, Unmatched Ease Forget the machines and the mess. Return to shop ABOUT US NONLA VIETNAM GLOBAL | Good Coffee for Good Life NONLA VIETNAM GLOBAL is a pioneering Vietnamese coffee brand that applies freeze-drying technology – a modern method that preserves the original flavor of Central Highlands coffee beans . We offer a convenient, sophisticated, and authentically Vietnamese coffee experience, where each small coffee capsule contains a story of Vietnamese identity, creativity, and pride. NONLA VIETNAM GLOBAL aims to spread national pride through every drop of exquisite coffee, so that Vietnamese people can enjoy the taste of Vietnam, and the world can remember Vietnam through the taste of authentic coffee. Beyond simply delivering quality products, NONLA VIETNAM GLOBAL aims for a new lifestyle – where coffee is not just a beverage, but a bridge connecting people, emotions, and cultures. More than just coffee, it’s a symbol of the connection between tradition and modernity, between refined taste and a dynamic global lifestyle. Coffee Production Process Vision As a pioneering Vietnamese coffee brand in applying freeze-drying technology – a modern method that helps preserve the original flavor of Central Highlands coffee beans. A trusted partner in the international market. A modern coffee culture icon , representing the Vietnamese spirit – simplicity, creativity, and sustainability. Mission “Spreading the flavors of Vietnam – elevating the Vietnamese coffee experience on the world map.” NONLA GLOBAL aims to bring Vietnamese coffee closer to international friends with its products: Pure – Authentic taste – Easy to prepare (dissolves quickly in cold or hot water). No sugar – No coffee machine needed – No waiting – perfect for modern life. Helping people, everywhere, enjoy the authentic taste of Vietnamese coffee in just seconds. Core Values Made from pure Robusta coffee beans from the Central Highlands region – roasted and dried according to international standards. Freeze-drying technology preserves the structure, aroma, and flavor of coffee – ensuring a perfect cup of coffee anytime, anywhere. Each NONLA coffee capsule is designed for easy brewing and portability, perfect for anyone who wants a quick and convenient option. 6 roasting levels – 4 distinctive flavors representing the diversity and creativity in Vietnamese coffee culture. We are committed to using clean raw materials , practicing environmentally friendly production methods , and supporting the sustainable development of coffee farming communities . Certificates – Certifications International standard for quality management systems ISO 22000:2018 We confirm that the entire production process complies with international Halal standards. 1 Ingredient Robusta coffee beans are sourced from renowned growing regions in Vietnam, ensuring firm beans, high caffeine content, and a rich flavor. Each batch of raw materials is checked for moisture content, aroma, and thoroughly cleaned of impurities before being used in production. 2 Harvest The coffee cherries are harvested selectively. Only ripe, high-quality red cherries are picked. This harvesting method ensures consistent quality in the batch, and allows green cherries more time to ripen. 3 Roasting & Grinding Coffee Each batch of coffee is roasted using a specific temperature profile to highlight the strong and aromatic flavor of Robusta. The coffee is then finely ground to ensure quick dissolution and preserve the full aroma during the freeze-drying process. Coffee Production Process 4 Freeze-drying technology The coffee extract is frozen at extremely low temperatures, then dried in a vacuum to allow water to evaporate directly from solid to vapor without passing through a liquid phase. This process preserves the original aroma, color, and flavor of the coffee, resulting in a dry, porous powder that dissolves quickly in cold water. 5 Quality Control After drying, the product undergoes rigorous testing: moisture content measurement, solubility testing, flavor evaluation, microbiological testing, and sensory evaluation. Only batches that meet the standards are moved to the packaging stage. This step demonstrates NONLA GLOBAL’s commitment to providing products that are not only delicious but also clean and safe. 6 Packaging & Storage The coffee is packaged in convenient forms – capsules, small boxes, or premium gift sets – suitable for both daily enjoyment and gifting. Finally, the product is stored in a cool, dry environment and is ready for distribution. nonla NONLA VIETNAM GLOBAL is a pioneering Vietnamese coffee brand that applies freeze-drying technology to preserve the original flavor of Central Highlands coffee beans. “Premium Co
